Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Defendant Trinet Hr Iii, Inc.S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Feder, Esq. 415-391-9476 for Plaintiff.
Annie Lau, Esq. 415-490-9023, Fisher & Phillips LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Michelle Cooper, CSR #13572, 800-590-1800. calendar-la@veritext.com, reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Defense Counsel Ms. Lau argues the issue on the arbitration agreeement and cites cases. Mr. Feder responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

4 - DEFENDANT REDMINT TWO, LLC'S Joinder In Defendant Trinet Hr Iii, Inc.S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Taken Under Submission.***

Prior to the hearing, a proposed order for all 5 motions from Defense counsel Fisher & Phillips is emailed to the court for review.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Michelle Cooper, CSR #13572, 800-590-1800. calendar-la@veritext.com, reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the Court issues an order denying in part and granting in part defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings pending completion of arbitration.***
